title: iCliniq is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: iCliniq is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
